name: Briggs, Rambie
resolved_employer: Dr. Rambie L. Briggs, MD — gastroenterologist/internist, Jonestown Community Health Center (Jonestown/Lago Vista, Travis County)
evidence: Rambie is a highly distinctive name; Dr. Rambie L. Briggs is a longtime physician (internal medicine/gastroenterology) practicing in Jonestown/Lago Vista in western Travis County. Gift went to Ann Howard, whose Precinct 3 covers that area — location and rare name corroborate.

name: Evans, Chip
resolved_employer: W.P. (Chip) Evans IV — founding partner, Evans / DeShazo / Reilley Law Firm (plaintiff's personal-injury firm, 4407 Bee Caves Rd, Austin 78746)
evidence: Employer string 'Evans / DeShazo / Reilley' matches Chip Evans's Austin personal-injury firm exactly; he is a plaintiff's trial lawyer, Texas-licensed since 1997. Donor zip 78735 is adjacent to the firm's 78746 office.

name: Bawcom, Debra

evidence: Employer 'Texas Protax' and occupation 'Property Tax Counselor' match Debra G. Bawcom, who has led the firm (property-tax appeal consulting) since 1995 and is a licensed property tax consultant and State Bar attorney. Cedar Park 78613 is consistent with a Central Texas base.

name: Wendler Jr., Ed (Mr.)

evidence: Ed Wendler Jr. is a well-documented Austin developer and land-use commentator (WatersMark Barton Creek; 1980s Planning Commission during last code overhaul); brother of the late Ed Wendler Sr., Austin's best-known 1980s City Hall lobbyist. Austin 78731 fits a longtime central-Austin figure. Gift to Brigid Shea (2016).

name: Mack Martinez, III

name: Roberts, Scott

evidence: Driftwood 78619 is the exact location of The Salt Lick; Scott Roberts has owned the landmark barbecue restaurant (and adjacent vineyard/winery) since 1985. He has been active on Texas winery/liquor-law policy. Gift to Brigid Shea (Precinct 2).
